project_name: SeAH Wind Teesworks Monopile Manufacturing Facility
location_name: South Bank, Teesworks, Redcar and Cleveland
source_name: UK Government and Tees Valley Combined Authority
notes: Directly located in Tees Valley. UK Government reported total site investment of £900m and 750 direct jobs; regional reporting states the facility became operational in 2025. Annual capacity reported as up to 200 monopiles.
